Operation 'getBlockedServers' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is vague about the hash format. Description lacks context about the purpose of blocked servers and response format details. Added clarification that hashes are used for client-side blocking, no auth required, and response is plain text format for better AI agent understanding of how to process the response.

data.current_description: Returns a newline-separated list of SHA-1 hashes of blocked server addresses.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve SHA-1 hashes of blocked servers
data.description_suggestion: Returns a newline-separated list of SHA-1 hashes representing blocked server addresses. This list is used by the Minecraft client to prevent connections to servers that violate Mojang's policies. No authentication required. The response is a plain text file with one SHA-1 hash per line.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about the hash format. Description lacks context about the purpose of blocked servers and response format details. Added clarification that hashes are used for client-side blocking, no auth required, and response is plain text format for better AI agent understanding of how to process the response.

message: Operation 'clientJoin' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. data.current_description: Called by the Minecraft client to verify login with a server. Rate limited to 6 joins per 30 seconds per account.
data.summary_suggestion: Verify client authentication with game server
data.description_suggestion: Called by the Minecraft client to verify successful authentication with a game server. Requires the player's access token, selected profile UUID, and server hash. Rate limited to 6 join attempts per 30 seconds per account. Returns HTTP 204 No Content on success, indicating the server can proceed with player join. On failure, returns an error response. This operation establishes the authentication link between client and server.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks input parameter details and doesn't explain the response or success criteria. Added information about required inputs (access token, profile UUID, server hash), success response (204 No Content), failure handling, and the purpose of establishing authentication link. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and how to interpret responses.

message: Operation 'serverHasJoined' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is incomplete about inputs and outputs. data.current_description: Called by the Minecraft server to verify that a client has authenticated.
data.summary_suggestion: Verify player authentication on server join
data.description_suggestion: Called by the Minecraft server to verify that a client has successfully authenticated before allowing them to join. Requires the player's username, server hash, and IP address. Returns the authenticated player's profile including UUID and skin/cape textures if verification succeeds. Returns an error response if the player has not authenticated or if the server hash does not match. This is the server-side counterpart to the client join verification.
data.reasoning: Original description is incomplete about inputs and outputs. Added specific required parameters (username, server hash, IP address), clarified the response includes profile data with textures, explained error conditions, and noted the relationship to client join verification. This enables AI agents to understand what data to send and what profile information will be returned.
